task_completion.visual_evidence: The main window of the Juris-M application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The 'Add Item(s) by Identifier' feature is used with the correct ISBN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add Item(s) by Identifier' popup (accessed via the magic wand icon) is visible, and the ISBN '978-0-674-00078-0' is entered into the text field.

task_completion.description: The book 'A Theory of Justice' is successfully added to the Juris-M library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The center pane of the Juris-M library shows a new entry with the title 'A Theory of Justice' and the creator/author 'Rawls'.

task_completion.description: A text file named 'identifier_import_result.txt' is created in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal window shows the file path '/home/ga/Documents/identifier_import_result.txt'.

task_completion.description: The text file contains the correct title and author.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the text file are visible and explicitly include the title 'A Theory of Justice' and the author 'John Rawls'.

integrity.description: The agent used the identifier tool rather than manually entering the book metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the 'Add Item(s) by Identifier' (magic wand) button, rather than the 'New Item' (green plus) button with manual typing in the right-hand metadata pane.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Juris-M graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Juris-M GUI is visible and interacted with, rather than terminal commands directly modifying the Juris-M SQLite database.

integrity.description: The text file was genuinely created and saved on the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: A real text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal command (e.g., echo, cat) is used to write and save the file, rather than just typing the answer into a generic prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct book associated with ISBN 978-0-674-00078-0 is 'A Theory of Justice' by John Rawls. The publisher is Belknap Press of Harvard University Press. The final text file must contain both the title ('A Theory of Justice') and the author ('John Rawls').
